arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Ipswich Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Aston Villa go in search of a first Premier League win in three matches when they host Ipswich at Villa Park on Saturday. Ahead of the match, we’ve made our score prediction, provided our pr...

arts.ttl: Aston Villa loan watch - Champions League dreams, debut goal, and an Argentina call-up - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: Sil Swinkels: He joined League One side Bristol Rovers on loan for the remainder of the season at the start of this month. Lino Sousa: The left-back joined Villa 13 months ago, but struggled for game time at Championship side Plymouth in the second half of last season.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery reveals plan for Marco Asensio as he delights in Aston Villa's attacking options
arts.sum: Emery has a gulf of attacking talent in his squad, with Jacob Ramsey in his best form for 18 months, plus Morgan Rogers, Leon Bailey and Ollie Watkins. Emery added: "I think it's very good for them [Rogers and Ramsey] to share a training session, to share matches, to try to connect with players like Marcus and Marco, with their skills.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Ipswich: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Aston Villa take on Ipswich in the Premier League on Saturday. Preview includes team news, predictions and how to watch on TV.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa boss Unai Emery vents his anger following Liverpool decision
arts.sum: The Aston Villa boss has seen more changes to the Villans' schedule be made this week and the Premier League have refused to move their upcoming clash with Liverpool to a later date

arts.ttl: Unai Emery reveals when Ezri Konsa will return amid Amadou Onana injury update
arts.sum: Aston Villa boss Unai Emery is hopeful Ezri Konsa will only be sidelined for a week through injury, but Amadou Onana could take longer to return to action. Aston Villa manager Unai Emery has given injury updates on Ezri Konsa and Amadou Onana

arts.ttl: Marco Asensio talks Aston Villa, Unai Emery and key reason behind surprise transfer
arts.sum: At the age of 29, three-time Champions League winner Marco Asensio has swapped Paris Saint-Germain for Aston Villa, following the tireless work of Unai Emery to persuade him to reignite his career in Birmingham

arts.ttl: Aston Villa sent worrying PSR transfer update as Unai Emery learns impact of Premier League vote
arts.sum: Aston Villa have been warned that they may not be able to spend as much as they'd like in the summer transfer window without breaching the Premier League's Profit and Sustainability Rules (PSR). Eager to remain in line with spending rules, the Villains kicked off the new year by recording a healthy profit in the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa stance vindicated as Premier League commercial rules declared ‘void’ after Man City challenge
arts.sum: Villa joined City in seeking to discourage their fellow top-flight clubs from voting through the Premier League amendments, joint owner Nassef Sawiris claiming it was better for them to present a united front over the issue, especially with the Government's Independent Football Regulator due to be brought in later this year. Aston Villa have been vindicated in their backing for Manchester City's challenge of the Premier League’s rules on commercial deals after they were declared “void and unenforceable” by an arbitration panel.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star responds to Man Utd & Aston Villa transfer interest
arts.sum: Barcelona midfielder Fermin Lopez has discussed the rumours linking him with a move to Manchester United and Aston Villa.
